title: Workflow Discovery Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger workflow discovery foundations judgment so ai / automation work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Workflow Discovery Foundations is a leverage point inside ai / automation. It supports the broader goal of workflow automation, copilots, agentic systems, and leverage through tooling.
coreConcepts: Workflow Discovery Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good workflow discovery foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Workflow Discovery Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
